raw:
## Completed
Implemented Foreman Gate 1 planner support with read-only planner agent, PLAN-JSON parsing/persistence, fallback rendering, manifest write gating, planner activity updates, and expanded planner tests.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md` - new read-only planner agent contract.
- `extensions/foreman/planner.ts` - pure planner validation/render/manifest helpers.
- `extensions/foreman/index.ts` - wired planner into Gate 1, persisted plan/source, writes `.pi/foreman.json` only after eligible approval.
- `extensions/foreman/ledger.ts` - mirrors `plan.meta.json`.
- `extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh` - added planner validation/render/manifest decision coverage.

## How To Verify
`bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh`

## Notes
Also ran `bash extensions/foreman/test/gate_flow_test.sh` successfully. No `gates.ts`, dashboard schema, or `ActivityPhase` changes.

## MACHINE BLOCK (MANDATORY — end your response with this exact block)

    "extensions/foreman/planner.ts - planner validation/render/manifest helper module",

    "extensions/foreman/ledger.ts - mirror planner metadata file",
    "extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh - planner helper coverage"
  ],
  "howToVerify": "bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh"
}
